elements.title: lang::report_page_047_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT c.id,
       c.fullname AS course,
       cc.name    AS category_name,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useragent = 'Firefox' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS firefox,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useragent = 'Chrome' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS chrome,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useragent = 'Safari' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS safari,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE
                    WHEN lit.useragent = 'Microsoft Edge' OR lit.useragent = 'Edge' THEN lit.timespend
                    ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS microsoft_edge,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useragent = 'Opera' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS opera,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useragent = 'Mobile browser' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS mobile_browser,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE
                    WHEN lit.useragent = 'Unknown Browser' OR lit.useragent IS NULL THEN lit.timespend
                    ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS other_browser,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useros LIKE 'Windows%' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS windows,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useros LIKE 'Mac OS%' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS mac_os,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useros = 'Linux' OR lit.useros = 'Ubuntu' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS linux,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE
                    WHEN lit.useros = 'iPhone' OR lit.useros = 'iPod' OR lit.useros = 'iPad' THEN lit.timespend
                    ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS ios,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useros = 'Android' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS android,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN lit.useros = 'Mobile' THEN lit.timespend ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS mobile,
       ROUND((SUM(CASE
                    WHEN lit.useros = 'Unknown OS Platform' OR lit.useros IS NULL THEN lit.timespend
                    ELSE 0 END) * 100) / SUM(lit.timespend),
             2)   AS other_platform
FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking lit
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course c ON c.id = lit.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories cc ON cc.id = c.category
WHERE lit.courseid > 1
  AND c.id IS NOT NULL
  AND c.visible = 1
GROUP BY lit.courseid, c.id, cc.id
